name: Klaviyo for Neto
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: User-added image]"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by "}, {"text": "Keetrax", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}, {"text": "\n"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://klaviyo4neto.com/", "children": [{"text": "Visit add-on website"}]}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "For support with this add-on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://klaviyo4neto.com/support/", "children": [{"text": "contact Keetrax"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "With Klaviyo For Neto you can:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Send truly personalized automations", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Trigger Flows based on dates, events, list membership, or segment membership and use splits, filters, A/B tests and more to target and optimize."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Define segments without limitations", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Use any combination of events, profile properties, location, predicted values, and more \u2014 over any time range."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Recapture lost sales", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Sell more with pre-built email flows, including abandoned cart and win back emails. Create custom flows using virtually any trigger."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Cut through the clutter", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Combine data from Neto and other leading apps to segment your audience and send super-targeted, personalized email campaigns."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Make better decisions", "bold": true}, {"text": ": See more than just opens and clicks. Klaviyo puts the results that matter front and centre so you can measure what really matters - sales."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Install and Set up the Klaviyo for Neto Add-on"}], "data-id": "install-and-set-up-the-klaviyo-for-neto-add-on"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up the Klaviyo for Neto add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel click on the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the Klaviyo for Neto add-on (in the marketing section) and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You\u2019ll be redirected to the Klaviyo for Neto site to authenticate your account."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter your Klaviyo API keys or to create a Klaviyo account."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the list in Klaviyo that you want your Neto customers added to."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Proceed", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and enter your payment information."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Complete the wizard to finalise your Klaviyo for Neto integration."}]}]}]}]
